task_completion.description: Create the CEmOC Facilities organisation unit group and assign the correct hospitals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Organisation Unit Group configuration screen in DHIS2. Verify the Name is 'CEmOC Facilities', Short name is 'CEmOC', and the right-side selection box for organisation units contains 'Bo Government Hospital' and 'Kenema Government Hospital'.

task_completion.description: Create the BEmOC Facilities organisation unit group and assign the correct CHCs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Organisation Unit Group configuration screen. Verify the Name is 'BEmOC Facilities', Short name is 'BEmOC', and the right-side selection box for organisation units contains 'Bandajuma Sowa CHC' and 'Mattru Jong CHC'.

task_completion.description: Create the Non-EmOC Facilities organisation unit group and assign the correct CHCs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Organisation Unit Group configuration screen. Verify the Name is 'Non-EmOC Facilities', Short name is 'Non-EmOC', and the right-side selection box for organisation units contains 'Ngelehun CHC' and 'Baoma CHC'.

task_completion.description: Create the EmOC Capability Level organisation unit group set with correct properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Organisation Unit Group Set configuration screen. Verify the Name is 'EmOC Capability Level', Short name is 'EmOC Level', and both the 'Compulsory' and 'Data dimension' checkboxes are checked.

task_completion.description: Assign the three created groups to the EmOC Capability Level group set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the Organisation Unit Group Set configuration screen for 'EmOC Capability Level', verify that the right-side selection box for Organisation unit groups contains 'CEmOC Facilities', 'BEmOC Facilities', and 'Non-EmOC Facilities'.

integrity.description: Agent used the DHIS2 web interface to perform the configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for browser windows showing the DHIS2 Maintenance app UI being actively used to create the groups and group sets.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no terminal windows showing curl commands, python scripts, or direct API calls to DHIS2.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the genuine DHIS2 application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the actual DHIS2 application running in a browser, not a text editor or mock interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating three Organisation Unit Groups and one Organisation Unit Group Set in DHIS2. 1. 'CEmOC Facilities' (Short name: 'CEmOC') containing 'Bo Government Hospital' and 'Kenema Government Hospital'. 2. 'BEmOC Facilities' (Short name: 'BEmOC') containing 'Bandajuma Sowa CHC' and 'Mattru Jong CHC'. 3. 'Non-EmOC Facilities' (Short name: 'Non-EmOC') containing 'Ngelehun CHC' and 'Baoma CHC'. 4. An Organisation Unit Group Set named 'EmOC Capability Level' (Short name: 'EmOC Level') that is marked as 'Compulsory' and 'Data dimension', and includes the three newly created groups as members.
